---
title: "Malaria Control Strategy Lab"
format:
  html:
    grid:
      body-width: 1200px
---

This lab allows you to explore different malaria control strategies given a fixed budget.
Adjust the sliders to see the impact on malaria prevalence in children aged 2-10 ($PfPR_{2-10}$) and the associated costs.


### Lab Instructions

1. **Phase 1:** Try to get $PfPR$ below 5% with **unlimited** budget.
2. **Phase 2:** Apply the $25,000 constraint.
3. **Phase 3:** Present your "Optimal Mix" to the class.

> **Note:** If your budget bar turns red, your strategy is disqualified!
